import { FaUserCircle, FaEnvelope, FaPhoneAlt, FaTrashAlt, } from "react-icons/fa"; function FeedbackItem({ feedback, onDelete }) { return (
{/* Header */}

{feedback.name}

{feedback.email}
{feedback.phone}
{/* Message */}
💬

{feedback.message}

{/* Footer */}
{new Date(feedback.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
); } export default FeedbackItem;
